# Feature Request

## Summary
A clear and concise summary of the feature you are requesting.

## Motivation / Problem
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Screenshots / Mockups
If applicable, add sketches, screenshots, or mockups to illustrate the idea.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, links, or references here.
